case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. ISIDRO ANTONIO ESCALANTE DIAZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCALANTE DIAZ, ISIDRO ANTONIO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $21.30 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ESCALANTE DIAZ, ISIDRO ANTONIO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED OCT-13-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESCALANTE DIAZ, ISIDRO ANTONIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY VICTOR ORTIZ--SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESCALANTE DIAZ, ISIDRO ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
